ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Bishop of Assisi|Bishop of Pesaro|Apostolic Referendary
ItacPersonItem.Notes: Clergyman, he received a degree in law at the University of Padua. He took part in the creation of the Ricovrati Academy, which he joined in 1599. He was described as `generoso di sangue e sperimentato nelle armi`. He was appointed Apostolic Referendary in 1605, Bishop of Pesaro in 1612 and Bishop pf Assisi in 1641.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
